title: B2C Premium — Progress Tracking
content:
Overview


The Progress page tracks the user's performance across all enrolled self-study courses. It shows course-by-course completion, overall statistics, and study activity.



Course Progress


The left section shows a progress bar for each enrolled course. Each bar displays:


  • Course name (e.g., "Physics Grade 11")
  • Completion percentage with a visual progress bar
  • Letter grade (e.g., B+, A-, A)

Progress is calculated based on quizzes completed, textbook chapters read, and other activities within the course. The grade is based on quiz scores for that course.



Overall Performance


The right section shows aggregate statistics across all courses:


  • Average Grade: Displayed prominently as a large percentage (e.g., 87%)
  • Quizzes Completed: Total number of quizzes taken across all courses
  • Study Hours: Estimated time spent studying on the platform
  • Current Streak: Consecutive days the user has been active
  • Enrolled Courses: Total number of courses the user is enrolled in

All stats update automatically as the user completes quizzes and studies materials. The streak resets if a day is missed.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Your progress stats update automatically as you complete quizzes and study materials."
  • "The streak counts consecutive days you've been active — it resets if you miss a day."
  • "Course progress bars show how close you are to completing each course."
  • "Your average grade is calculated from all quiz scores across all courses."
  • "If your progress seems stuck, try completing another quiz or chapter to trigger an update."
